title: Pakistan smartphone price pressure
quote_display_text: Consumers in Pakistan are sensitive to price increases because household budgets, import costs, taxes and exchange-rate pressure can quickly change perceived value.

title: Brand trust and channel confidence
quote_display_text: Brand trust, after-sales service, shopkeeper advice, family recommendations and visible peer usage strongly influence phone choice.

title: Daily usage priorities
quote_display_text: Battery, storage, performance, camera, display and durability matter because phones are used for study, work, family contact, content and payments.
